title: Time, Gentlemen, Please!
writer: R.J. Minney, Val Valentine, Peter Blackmore
actors: Eddie Byrne, Jane Barrett, Robert Brown
plot: Because of its high productivity and "almost" 100 per cent employment, the village of Little Hayhoe, England is expecting a visit from the Prime Minister. The "almost" is because of Dan Dance (Eddie Byrne), an old rogue who would ...
